_comment: Default whitelist for scripts/lint-fungi.mjs (the .fungi source-quality gate). It exempts intentionally-minimal FIXTURE .fungi (example apps, test corpora, perf benchmarks, REJECT-case tests) from the production 'every flow is commented + contracted' rules. Production package src/ IS still linted. Tune freely: skipPathContains = whole-file exemptions by path substring; rules = disable a code globally; files = exempt an exact rel-path; allow = [{file,rule,line}] for one finding. Inline, prefer //fungi-allow: CODE on the offending line.
